entities.name: thread-export
entities.context: Command that generates After-Action Reports and exports conversation threads with artifacts in modular format

entities.name: thread-checkpoint
entities.context: Alias for thread-export, used to create non-destructive conversation checkpoints

entities.name: conversation-end
entities.context: Full conversation closure command that calls thread-export as Phase 0

entities.name: After-Action Report (AAR)
entities.context: Documentation format for capturing thread outcomes, exported as JSON source of truth

entities.name: threads workflow
entities.context: Workflow category that thread-export belongs to

relationships.context: thread-checkpoint is an alias for thread-export
conversation-end calls thread-export as Phase 0 for full conversation closure
thread-export generates AAR documentation as its primary output
thread-export is part of the threads workflow
